Retrieve the size of the QuantitativeTrack

trackSize.Rd

Retrieve the size of the QuantitativeTrack

Usage

# S4 method for class 'QuantitativeTrack'
trackSize(obj)

Arguments

obj

An object of class UCSCBedAnnotationTrack

Value

The number of elements
